description: A manager needs to allocate a campaign's total budget across its different ad groups based on their strategic priority.

nodes.task_description: Identify the total campaign budget and the different ad groups within it.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent has the necessary budget and campaign structure information.

nodes.task_description: Allocate a higher percentage of the budget to high-priority ad groups (e.g., those targeting high-intent keywords).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent determines a logical budget split (e.g., 60% to Ad Group A, 40% to Ad Group B).

nodes.task_description: Set the specific daily or lifetime budgets for each ad group in the platform.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the budget settings for each ad group.
